LanguageData.ARA_Cleaning.label: clean
LanguageData.ARA_Cleaning.description: Allows the creature to perform cleaning tasks.
LanguageData.ARA_Sowing.label: planting
LanguageData.ARA_Sowing.description: Allows the creature to perform farming tasks.
LanguageData.ARA_Slayer_Ability1_Train.label: Carnage and collision
LanguageData.ARA_Slayer_Ability1_Train.description: Crash into the target with its huge body, causing damage to everything in its path. The further the distance traveled during the impact, the higher the damage.
LanguageData.ARA_Ability_SlayerCharge.label: Carnage and collision
LanguageData.ARA_Ability_SlayerCharge.description: Crash into the target with its huge body, causing damage to everything in its path. The further the distance traveled during the impact, the higher the damage.
